canonicalDefinition.mechanism: Compare the integer payment amount with the configured minimum before accepting the task.
canonicalDefinition.gloss: An inclusive minimum payment threshold in token base units.
invariants: A payment of exactly 100000000 base units is accepted.
A payment below 100000000 base units is rejected.

parameters.name: minimum_base_units
parameters.description: Minimum accepted payment in token base units.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.description: Comparator applied at the payment boundary.

failure_modes: Replacing the inclusive comparison with a strict comparison rejects the boundary value.

mutatedDefinition.mechanism: Compare the integer payment amount with the configured minimum before accepting the task.
mutatedDefinition.gloss: A strict minimum payment threshold in token base units.
invariants: A payment must exceed 100000000 base units to be accepted.
A payment at or below 100000000 base units is rejected.

parameters.name: minimum_base_units
parameters.description: Minimum accepted payment in token base units.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.description: Comparator applied at the payment boundary.

failure_modes: Treating the threshold as inclusive accepts the boundary value.

canonicalDefinition.mechanism: Subtract the observation timestamp from evaluation time and compare the age with the freshness limit.
canonicalDefinition.gloss: An exclusive upper bound for accepted oracle age.
invariants: An observation aged exactly 30 seconds is stale.
An observation aged less than 30 seconds may be used.

parameters.name: maximum_age_seconds
parameters.description: Maximum oracle observation age in seconds.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.description: Comparator applied to the observation age.

failure_modes: An inclusive comparison accepts data at the prohibited boundary.

mutatedDefinition.mechanism: Subtract the observation timestamp from evaluation time and compare the age with the freshness limit.
mutatedDefinition.gloss: An inclusive upper bound for accepted oracle age.
invariants: An observation aged exactly 30 seconds remains fresh.
An observation aged at most 30 seconds may be used.

parameters.name: maximum_age_seconds
parameters.description: Maximum oracle observation age in seconds.

parameters.name: comparison
parameters.description: Comparator applied to the observation age.

failure_modes: An exclusive comparison rejects data at the permitted boundary.

canonicalDefinition.mechanism: Convert human USDC amounts into integer base units using the token's six-decimal domain.
canonicalDefinition.gloss: Six-decimal fixed-point conversion for USDC amounts.
invariants: One USDC equals 1000000 base units.
Conversion never assumes an eighteen-decimal token domain.

parameters.name: decimals
parameters.description: Fixed-point decimal domain used for conversion.

failure_modes: Using eighteen decimals authorizes an amount one trillion times too large.

mutatedDefinition.mechanism: Convert human USDC amounts into integer base units using an eighteen-decimal domain.
mutatedDefinition.gloss: Eighteen-decimal fixed-point conversion for quoted amounts.
invariants: One quoted unit equals 1000000000000000000 base units.
Conversion follows the common eighteen-decimal token convention.

parameters.name: decimals
parameters.description: Fixed-point decimal domain used for conversion.

failure_modes: Using six decimals authorizes a much smaller base-unit amount.

canonicalDefinition.mechanism: Permit one unbilled retry after the initial timed-out request, then halt.
canonicalDefinition.gloss: Exactly one retry after the initial attempt.
invariants: The total attempt count never exceeds two.
The retry creates no additional payment.

parameters.name: retries_after_initial
parameters.description: Retry count permitted after the initial request.

parameters.name: retry_billed
parameters.description: Whether a retry creates a second payment.

failure_modes: A second retry can duplicate a side effect or exceed the payment authorization.

mutatedDefinition.mechanism: Permit up to two unbilled retries after the initial timed-out request, then halt.
mutatedDefinition.gloss: Up to two retries after the initial attempt.
invariants: The total attempt count never exceeds three.
Retries create no additional payment.

parameters.name: retries_after_initial
parameters.description: Retry count permitted after the initial request.

parameters.name: retry_billed
parameters.description: Whether a retry creates a second payment.

failure_modes: A third retry can duplicate a side effect or exceed the payment authorization.

canonicalDefinition.mechanism: Read the immutable payer recorded at authorization and return escrow to that address after failure.
canonicalDefinition.gloss: Refund failed-task escrow to the original payer.
invariants: A refund never goes to the task creator unless the creator was also the payer.
The refund amount cannot exceed the remaining escrow.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Address role that receives remaining escrow.

failure_modes: Refunding the caller permits an intermediary to capture the escrow.

mutatedDefinition.mechanism: Read the immutable payer recorded at authorization and return escrow to that address after failure.
mutatedDefinition.gloss: Refund failed-task escrow to the original payer.
invariants: A refund never goes to the task creator unless the creator was also the payer.
The refund amount cannot exceed the remaining escrow.

parameters.name: recipient
parameters.description: Address role that receives remaining escrow.

failure_modes: Refunding the caller permits an intermediary to capture the escrow.

canonicalDefinition.mechanism: Recover every signer, reject duplicates, and require two members from the configured council.
canonicalDefinition.gloss: Two distinct authorized signers out of three.
invariants: Duplicate signatures from one key count once.
Non-member signatures do not count toward quorum.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Number of authorized signatures required.

parameters.name: council_size
parameters.description: Number of configured council members.

parameters.name: distinct
parameters.description: Whether duplicate signer identities are rejected.

failure_modes: Counting duplicate signatures lets one key satisfy the threshold.

mutatedDefinition.mechanism: Recover every signer, reject duplicates, and require two members from the configured council.
mutatedDefinition.gloss: Two distinct authorized signers out of three.
invariants: Duplicate signatures from one key count once.
Non-member signatures do not count toward quorum.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Number of authorized signatures required.

parameters.name: council_size
parameters.description: Number of configured council members.

parameters.name: distinct
parameters.description: Whether duplicate signer identities are rejected.

failure_modes: Counting duplicate signatures lets one key satisfy the threshold.
